## Why

## How

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] JSDoc added for any new public exports
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] No breaking changes (or discussed in issue first)
